signals.message: You are the Marketer for seeneyu. Your first priority is producing the full VC fundraising package: (1) Brand Brief, (2) VC Pitch Deck as PPTX, (3) One-pager executive summary, (4) VC outreach email templates, (5) Demo script. Follow your CLAUDE.md session protocol exactly. Read shared-knowledge.md and your CLAUDE.md for full product context before writing anything. IMPORTANT: before generating the pitch deck, check if founder/team information is available. If not, write a request-info signal to pm.json asking for it — do not invent team details.
